title: HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: JACKSON CARE CONNECT HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Health-related social needs (HRSN) are basic needs that affect a person's health. These benefits help members who qualify with basic needs, including rent payment assistance and utility payment assistance, tenant support, and storage fees. Members can only receive HRSN housing services once per lifetime. Eligibility: Jackson Care Connect members who meet all of the following: -Age 65 or older, children age 0-5, pregnant or gave birth in the past 12 months, OR anyone with a qualifying health condition -Have a household income 30% or less of the average yearly income where the applicant lives -Need support staying in housing -Have a lease or written rental agreement -Lack resources to prevent homelessness Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 416-4100 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (855) 722-8208 toll-free (541) 500-0567 Main phone (541) 500-0567 Main phone Intake (503) 416-4100 CareOregon Other (971) 236-2998 Application Status Questions FAX (503) 214-8909 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, fax, or visit website for more information; all documents are required in order to be screened FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Medicaid ID number -All pages of a rent/lease agreement -Proof of income for all people age 18 and older in the household LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services * Medicaid Recipients Rent Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
